description: User 1 (pn@getsally.io): CRM page verification — contacts visible from all pipelines, conversation tab as default, reply type filters, source tracking, pipeline-to-CRM links.

steps.description: All gathered contacts should be visible in CRM.
steps.user_prompt: Show me my contacts in CRM
user_prompt_variants: How many contacts do I have?

steps.description: When clicking a contact, conversation tab shows planned sequence + actual replies.
steps.critical_requirement: First tab MUST be conversation, not details.

steps.description: Contact detail shows source (which pipeline/campaign brought this contact).
Pipeline page links to CRM filtered by pipeline contacts.

screenshots_needed.check: All contacts visible with columns: Email, Name, Company, Campaign, Reply Type, Status
Modal opens with Conversation tab as default
Source and filters visible in Source tab
